sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in source material

special_mechanics.name: Six-Degrees-of-Freedom Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player pilots a fighter spaceship from first-person perspective in zero gravity, allowing free movement across three-dimensional planes with rotation on three axes (pitch, yaw, and roll). Movement is not constrained to traditional horizontal/vertical directions.

special_mechanics.name: Afterburner
special_mechanics.description: Energy-based boost system with dedicated afterburner energy gauge on HUD. Provides enhanced acceleration capability.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but no specific physics values (velocities, accelerations, gravity constants). Game operates in zero-gravity environment with six-degrees-of-freedom movement paradigm, fundamentally different from grounded platformer physics. No documented sub-pixel system, jump mechanics (not applicable in zero-g), or precise speed values.
